SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MOHAMED ELSAYED IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL GARCIA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT GARCIA, MICHAEL TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT ELSAYED, MOHAMED SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELSAYED, MOHAMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, MICHAEL $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,990.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2019 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. MICHAEL GARCIA DOES NOT OWE MOHAMED ELSAYED ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JUN-06-2019. UNLESS PICKED UP BY THE LITIGANT, EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JPT: R. STUMPF; CLERK: R. GOULDING; NOT REPORTED
